title: Platform settings
description: Global SaaS settings that apply to every clinic.

intro.title: In-app assistant control
intro.body: Set the daily message limit, edit the announcement copy, and launch it to every clinic. Republishing shows it again even if users already dismissed it. As superadmin you have no limit and can use the assistant in this portal (billing, clinics, etc.).

assistant.title: In-app AI assistant
assistant.description: Daily message cap per clinic user (help + read-only lookups). Superadmin is unlimited.

announcement.title: Clinic announcement
announcement.description: Modal tenants see on login until they tap Got it. Edit the content here.

fields.daily_limit_hint: Between 1 and 1000. Resets at midnight (app timezone). Recommended default: 40. Does not apply to superadmin.
fields.announcement_active_hint: When enabled, clinics see the notice once per user and version.
fields.announcement_title_hint: Leave empty to use the built-in default text.
fields.announcement_feature_hint: Optional. If all are empty, default highlights are used.

footer.never_updated: No global configuration has been saved yet.
